patch_history.raw: Guided Salvo Cost: 150. Now has 2 charges. Grants a free charge on round start. Each individual rocket used will consume 1 charge. The cooldown has been removed. Map Targeting Range decreased from 55m to 45m. Stealth Drone Cost: 300 >>> 400 Special Delivery Cost: 300 >>> 200 Armageddon Ult points increased from 8 to 9 v

patch_history.raw: Stealth Drone Fixed an issue where players could boost on Tejo’s Stealth Drone. Fixed an issue where Stealth Drone could not be tagged by Cypher’s camera. Armageddon Fixed an issue where Armageddon VFX may remain after being used. Fixed an issue where there was no danger indicator for players running through Armeggadon from the back side. v
Armageddon Fixed an issue where Armageddon’s floor indicator persisted across rounds. v
Stealth Drone Fixed a bug where Stealth Drone was not unstealthing upon jumping up prior to its scan. v
Armageddon Fixed a bug where Armageddon’s danger indicator did not always apply on variable elevations v
Guided Salvo Max damage decreased from 70 >>> 65 Minimum damage remains unchanged Now does 50% damage to non-player objects. v

patch_history.raw: Armageddon Fixed an issue where players could rarely survive running straight through the full duration of Armageddon v

Stealth Drone Fixed an issue where Stealth Drone affected by Nearsight could see Enemy Players’ model outline at certain distances. Fixed an issue where Stealth Drone is slowed outside the AOE of Sage’s Slow Orb. Guided Salvo Fixed an issue where Guided Salvo projectile would get stuck inside the wall when cast towards a path blocked by Sage’s Barrier Orb. Fixed an issue where Guided Salvo missile visuals are set to draw as a Cylinder instead of Sphere, showing an incorrect damage zone. Fixed an issue where Guided Salvo loses functionality and appears as stuck if he cast it while being outside of the map. Fixed an issue where Guided Salvo damages players on elevation without showing a warning indicator. Armageddon Fixed an issue where players who exited then re-entered Tejo’s Armageddon bl

Stealth Drone Fixed a bug where it could ride on various projectiles. Armageddon Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where its targeting cursor could go outside of the ability map UI. Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where Agents with an ability map UI would repeatedly play their equip animation when switching to their POV. Guided Salvo Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where Agents with an ability map UI would repeatedly play their equip animation when switching to their POV.
